extraction.one_line_summary: ALMEIDA João won from a compressed sprint after GORDU David's late attack on 12-13% ramps was reeled in by AG2R.
tactical_patterns: DECEUNINCK QuickStep overcooked domestique work pre-finale, creating hesitation despite ALMEIDA being strongest finisher available.
AG2R chase of GORDU paradoxically gifted UAE positional advantage, demonstrating how chasing teammate attacks backfires in compressed finales.
Left-hand road compression with 250m remaining punished early right-side positioning, rewarding ALMEIDA's late patience over HERSHEY's earlier commitment.

rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: Converted bonus seconds into GC lead despite team overworking, suggests form peak ahead of Worlds.
rider_signals.HERSHEY Mark: negative: Had finishing speed for win but tactical positioning error on compressed finale cost him victory.
rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: Solo move on 12-13% ramps nearly succeeded, signals dangerous form for punchy finales despite teammate chase confusion.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: Top-five on steep finish suggests reasonable condition but couldn't respond when ALMEIDA accelerated.
